messages.content: aayubowan!
aayubowan kohoma da! kohomada mama ada obata upakara kala hakke keseda?
kalagunaya penane mokak wage da?
danata, manda sulangak samanga hiru rashmiya.
obata pothak nirdesha kala hakida?
sahathikayi! hapar lige To Kill a Mockingbird gana kohomada?
mata wihiluwak kiyanna.
widyagnyayan paramanu wishwasa nokaranne ayi? owun siyalla sadu nisa!
oyage nama kumak da?
mama, obe AI sahayaka.
mama pasta uyanne keseda?
wathura unu, pasta ekathu karanna, winadi 8-10 k uyanna, inpasu iwathata gena sewaya karanna.
pranshaye aganuwara kumakda?
pranshaye aganuwara wanne paris ya.
oyage wayasa kiya da?
mama OpenAI wisin nirmanaya karana lada AI kenek nisa mata wayasak naha.
obata sangithaya wadanaya kala hakida?
mata sangithaya wadanaya kala nohaka, namuth mata githa kihipayak yojana kala hakiya.
welawa kiyada?
mata nishchitha welawa pawasiya nohaka, namuth obata eya obage upangayen pariksha kala haka.
jiwithaye arutha kumakda?
jiwithaye arutha gambauru prashnayak wana athara eya boho wita sathuta, danuma saha ituwima sewimata sambandha yayi salake.
obata mage gedara wada sandaha mata udaw kala hakida?
aththa washayen! obata udaw awashya wishayaya kumakda?
mama langama athi rohalata yanne keseda?
ikmanma dishawan sandaha obata obage durakathanaye sithiyam yedumak bhawitha kala haka.
obage priyathama warnaya kumakda?
mata priyathama warnayak natha, namuth boho aya nil walata kamathiyi.
mage ingrisi wadi diyunu karanne keseda?
nithipatha puhunu wanna, poth kiyawanna, ingrisiyen chithrapata balanna, saha swadeshika kathikayan samanga katha karanna.
obata meya ma wenuwen pariwarthanaya kala hakida?
nisakawama, karunakara obata pariwarthanaya kirimata awashya pela sapayanna.
hondama kramalekhana bhashawa kumakda?
eya obage awashyatha matha randa pawathi. Python aarambhakayin saha daththa widyawa sandaha wishishta wana athara JavaScript web sanwardhanaya sandaha athyawashya we.
mama web adawiyak sada ganne keseda?
obata HTML, CSS saha JavaScript samanga aarambha kala haka. obata upakara kirimata boho sabandi nibandhana thibe.
godabima sitina wegawathma sathwaya kumakda?
chita yanu wegawathma godabima sathwaya wana athara, payata sathapum 60-70 dakwa dhawanaya kala hakiya.
mata rasawath deyak kiyanna.
mi pani kawadawath narak nowana bawa oba dannawada? purawidyagnyayan wisin wasara 3,000 kata wada parani saha thawamath aaharayata gatha haki parani eejipthu sohon wala mi pani bhajana soyagena atha.
mama mage ginuma maka damanne keseda?
obata samanyayen oba bhawitha karana sewawe situwam ho ginum kalamanakarana anshayen obage ginuma maka damiya haka.
obata winodajanaka karunak kiyanna puluwanda?
sahathikayi! flamingo samuhayak handunwanne flamboyans yanuweni.
mama mage murapadaya wenas karanne keseda?
oba bhawitha karana sewawe sakasim ho ginum kalamanakarana anshaya wetha gos murapadaya wenas karanna soyanna.
ape sauragraha mandalaye wishalathama grahalokaya kumakda?
ape sauragraha mandalaye wishalathama grahalokaya brahaspathi grahayayi.
pankek sandaha wattoruwak laba diya hakida?
sahathikayi! piti, kiri, biththara saha lunu swalpayak mishra karanna. ran dumbauru thek unusum dalak matha uyanna.
mage durakathanaya nawatha sakasanne keseda?
samanyayen, obata obage durakathanaya bakap saha riset yatathe athi situwam menuwa thula ho ee ha samana wikalpayak nawatha sakasiya haka.
2+2 yanu kumakda?
2+2 samana 4.
mata honda awanhal soyagatha hakke kothaninda?
obata awata athi honda awanhal soya ganimata saha samalochanaya kirimata Yelp ho Google Maps wani yedum bhawitha kala haka.
mama wen kirimak karanne keseda?
obata samanyayen awanhale web adawiya haraha ho owun amathimen margagathawa wen karawa gatha haka.
obata prabhasanshleshanaya pahadili kala hakida?
prabhasanshleshanaya yanu haritha shaka kaban dayoksayid saha jalayen aahara sansleshanaya kirima sandaha hiru eliya bhawitha karana kriyawaliyayi.
AI yanu kumakda?
AI, nohoth kruthrima buddhiya, minisun men sithimata saha igenimata kramalekhanaya kara athi yanthrawala manawa buddhiya anukaranaya kirima adahas karayi.
aalokaye wegaya kiyada?
rikthayaka aalokaye wegaya aasanna washayen thathparayata kilomitar 299,792 (ho thathparayata sathapum 186,282 k pamana) we.
mama nirogiwa sitiya hakke keseda?
samabara aahara welak ganna, nithipatha wyayama karanna, pramanawath nindak laba ganna, dumpanaya saha adhika lesa mathpan panaya kirimen walakinna.
lokaye usama godanagilla kumakda?
lokaye usama godanagilla wanne dubayi hi barj kalifa wana athara ehi usa mitar 828 (adi 2,717) we.
obata mata rakiyawak soya ganimata udaw kala hakida?
sahathikayi! obata obe jiwa daththa pathraya yawathkalina kirimen saha LinkedIn, Indeed, ho Glassdoor wani web adawiwala rakiya awastha sewimen aarambha kala haka.
mama tayi patiyak banda ganne keseda?

wiwidha krama atha, namuth wadath sulabha wanne hathara atha gatayayi. patu kelawara haraha pulul kelawara haras kirimen aarambha karanna, inpasu idiripasa gataya haraha eya ada ganimata pera eya wata saha gela lupaya haraha lup karanna.
nawa bhashawak igena ganimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
akhanda puhunuwa, bhasha igenime yedum bhawitha kirima, swadeshiya kathikayan samanga sambandha wima saha madhya saha sanwadaya haraha bhashawa thula obama gilwima paladayi krama we.
obata ganitha gatalu wisandiya hakida?
ow, mata ganitha gatalu walata udaw karanna puluwan. obata upakara awashya wanne kumak sandahada?
mama mudal ithiri karanne keseda?
ayawayak sadanna, obe wiyadam nirikshanaya karanna, anawashya miladi ganimwalin walakinna, saha obe aadayamen kotasak ithurum sandaha wen karanna.
wadathma janakirna rata kumakda?
lokaye wadima janagahanayak sitina rata chinayayi.
obata mata wyayama ingi kihipayak laba diya hakida?
unusum wimakin aarambha karanna, hruda ha shakthi puhunuwa mishra karanna, sajalanaya wi sitinna, saha thuwala walakwa ganimata obata nisi aakruthiyak athi bawata sahathika wanna.
mama thira ruwak ganne keseda?
upangaya anuwa kramaya wenas we. boho pariganaka sandaha, Mac ekaka PrtScn ho Command + Shift + 4 obanna. smartfon sandaha, balaya saha shabdaya adu kirime boththam ekawara obanna.
lokaye kudama rata kumakda?
bhumi pramanaya anuwa lowa kudama rata wathikanu nagarayayi.
pariganaka ithihasaya gana mata kiyanna puluwanda?

pariganaka mul yanthrika ganaka yanthrawala sita nawina dijital paddhathi dakwa parinamaya wi atha. transistaraya soya ganima, kshudra prosesaraya diyunu kirima saha 1970 saha 1980 ganan waladi pudgalika pariganakakaranaye nagima pradhana sandhisthana we.
mama ayawayak nirmanaya karanne keseda?

obe aadayam prabhawayan layisthugatha karanna, obe wiyadam nirikshanaya karanna, wiyadam wargikaranaya karanna, saha obe mulya paladayi lesa kalamanakaranaya kirima sandaha ek ek kandaya sandaha simawan sakasanna.
wiweka ganimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
kiyawima, bhawana kirima, wyayama kirima ho sobadahame kalaya gatha kirima wani obata wiweka ganimata upakara wana kriyakarakam soyanna.
obata mata rachanayak liwimata udaw kala hakida?
aththa washayen! pahadili nibandhana prakashayakin aarambha karanna, dala satahanak sadanna, sakshi samanga obe tharkawalata sahaya wanna, saha shakthimath saranshayak samanga awasan karanna.
pruthiwiya saha sanda athara dura kopamanada?
pruthiwiya saha sanda athara samanya dura kilomitar 384,400 (sathapum 238,855) pamana we.
obata mata uputa dakwimak kiyanna puluwanda?
sahathikayi! heta pilibanda apage awabodhaye ekama simawa ada apage sakayayi. - Franklin D. Roosevelt
mage liwime kusalatha wadi diyunu karanne keseda?
obe kusalatha wadi diyunu kirima sandaha pulul lesa kiyawanna, nithipatha liyanna, prathiposhana soyanna saha wiwidha lekhana wilasayan puhunu wanna.
payithagaras prameyaya yanu kumakda?
payithagaras prameyaya pawasanne srujukonasrakara thrikonayaka, karnaye wargaya anek pathi deke wargawala ekathuwata samana wana bawayi.
mama eemel ginumak sakasanne keseda?
eemel sapayanneku thoranna, owunge web adawiyata gos, liyapadinchi wanna ho ginuma sadanna matha klik kara, obe widyuth thapala sakasimata upades anugamanaya karanna.
obage priyathama aaharaya kumakda?
AI kenek widiyata mama kama kanne naha, namuth godak aya pisa rasawindinawa.
obata gamanak salasum kirimata mata udaw kala hakida?
sahathikayi! gamananthayak thiranaya karanna, ayawayak sakasanna, obe prawahanaya saha nawathan wenkarawa ganna, saha obe sancharaya sandaha kriyakarakam salasum karanna.
mama ketha kirimata igena ganne keseda?
Python wani aarambhaka-hithakami bhasha walin aarambha karanna, sabandi sampath bhawitha karanna, nithipatha puhunu wanna, saha obe kusalatha godanaga ganimata kuda wyapruthiwala wada karanna.
bara adu kara ganimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
nithipatha wyayama samanga saukhya sampanna aahara welak eekabaddha karanna, sajalanaya wanna, saha bara adu kara ganimata pramanawath nindak laba ganna.
obata guruthwakarshanaya pahadili kala hakida?

guruthwakarshanaya yanu grahalokayak ho wenath wasthuwak thama kendraya desata wasthun ada ganna balayayi. eya bhauthika wasthun sandaha bara laba dena athara eewa bima watena wita bimata watimata hethu we.
pathali tayarayak sawi karanne keseda?

palamuwa, lug nat lihil karanna, pasuwa motar rathaya osawannata jak ekak bhawitha karanna, pathali tayaraya iwath kara amathara kotasa samanga eya prathisthapanaya karanna. lug gedi thada kara motar rathaya nawatha pahalata pahath karanna.
lokaye wadathma janapriya kridawa kumakda?
lowa janapriyama kridawa papandu lesinda handunwanu labana papanduya.
obata mage jiwa daththa pathraya samanga mata udaw kala hakida?

niyatha washayenma! saranshayak, sewa palapurudda, adhyapanaya saha kusalatha samangin obe sambandhatha thorathuru samanga aarambha karanna. oba ayadum karana rakiyawata galapena paridi eya sakas karanna.
mama abhipreranayen sitinne keseda?
pahadili ilakka sakasanna, karyayan kuda piyawarawalata kadanna, jayagrahana sandaha obatama wipaka denna, saha dhanathmaka manasikathwayak pawathwa ganna.
pruthiwiye wishalathama sagaraya kumakda?
pruthiwiye wishalathama sagaraya pasifik sagarayayi.
obata mata manga penwim laba diya hakida?
aththa washayenma, karunakara obage wathman sthanaya saha gamananthaya laba denna.
idiripath kirimak nirmanaya karanne keseda?
PowerPoint ho Google Slides wani idiripath kirime mewalamak thoranna, dala satahanak sadanna, pradhana karunu samanga obe winiwidaka salasum karanna, saha obe beda harima puhunu wanna.
mudal aayojanaya kirimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
obe aayojana wiwidhangikaranaya karanna, wiwidha wikalpa paryeshana karanna, obe awadanam iwasima salaka balanna, saha mulya wisheshagnyayingen upades ganna.
kalu kuhara gana mata kiyanna puluwanda?

kalu kuharayak yanu guruthwakarshanaya etharam prabala wana awakashaye pradeshayak wana athara eyin kisiwakata, aalokayata pawa galawiya nohaka. eewaye guruthwakarshanaya yatathe dawantha tharaka kada watena wita eewa sade.
mage mrudukangaya yawathkalina karanne keseda?

obage upangaye ho mrudukanga yedume situwam menuwa wetha gos, yawathkalina kirima ho yawathkalina kirim sandaha pariksha karanna sandaha balanna, saha pawathina yawathkalina sthapanaya kirimata upades anugamanaya karanna.
wairas saha baktiriya athara wenasa kumakda?
wairas baktiriya walata wada kuda wana athara eewa prathiwarthanaya wimata dharaka sailayak awashya wana athara baktiriya swadhinawa jiwath wiya haki thani saila jiwin we.
obata mage badu sandaha mata udaw kala hakida?
mata samanya upades sapayiya haka, namuth obe badu sambandhayen nishchitha upakara sandaha badu wruththikayekugen upades laba ganima wadath sudusuya.
mama smart jangama durakathanayak bhawitha karanne keseda?
eya kriyathmaka karanna, tachskrin bhawithayen sanchalanaya karanna, yedum gabadawen yedum baganna, saha obe upangaya abhiruchikaranaya kirimata sakasim menuwa bhawitha karanna.
wibhagayakata padam kirimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
adhyayana kalasatahanak sadanna, sakriya igenum shilpiya krama bhawitha karanna, wiweka ganna, saha paladayi lesa sudanam wimata pasugiya wibhaga prashna puhunu karanna.
mama wyaparayak aarambha karanne keseda?
wyapara salasmak sakas karanna, welandapala paryeshana pawathwanna, aramudal surakshitha karanna, obe wyaparaya liyapadinchi karanna, saha obe nishpadana ho sewa alewi kirima aarambha karanna.
prabhasanshleshana kriyawaliya kumakda?
prabhasansleshanaya yanu shaka hiru eliya, kaban dayoksayid saha jalaya glukos saha oksijan bawata pariwarthanaya karana kriyawaliyayi.
obata sapekshatha wadaya pahadili kala hakida?

ayinstayinge sapekshathawadaye wishesha saha samanya nyayan athulath we. wishesha sapekshathawadaya kalaya ha awakashaya sapeksha bawa pawasamin niyatha wegayen chalanaya wana wasthun samanga ganudenu karayi. samanya sapekshathawadaya guruthwakarshanaya pahadili karanne skandhayen awakasha kalaye wakraya lesini.
aayubowan!
aayubowan! ada mama obata udaw karanne keseda?
oyata kohoma da?
mama hondin karanawa, sthuthiyi! mama oyata udaw karanne kese da?
oyage nama kumak da?
mama, obe athathya sahakara.
mata wihiluwak kiyanna.
widyagnyayan paramanu wishwasa nokaranne ayi? owun siyalla sadu nisa!

mata welawa balanna baha. karunakara obage upangaya desa balanna.
kalagunaya penane mokak wage da?
mata dan kalagunaya pariksha kala nohaka, namuth obata kalaguna yedumak bhawitha kala haka.
oyage wayasa kiya da?
mama OpenAI wisin nirmanaya karana lada AI kenek nisa mata wayasak naha.
obata sangithaya wadanaya kala hakida?
mata sangithaya wadanaya kala nohaka, namuth mata githa kihipayak nirdesha kala hakiya.
obage priyathama warnaya kumakda?
AI lesa, mata priyathama warnayak nomatha.
oba pisa walata kamathida?

oyata mata udaw kala haki da?

mama bath uyanne keseda?
sahal soda, jalaya ekathu kara, jalaya awashoshanaya wana thek manda gindare uyanna.
oya kohe sita da?
mama OpenAI wisin nirmanaya karana lada dijital lokayen wemi.
obata yam winodanshayak thibeda?
mata winodansha natha, namuth mata rasawath eewa soya ganimata obata udaw kala hakiya.
obata kumak kala hakida?
prashnawalata pilithuru sapayimata, thorathuru sapayimata saha wiwidha karyayan sandaha upakara kirimata mata sahaya wiya haka.
2+2 yanu kumakda?
2+2 samana 4.
obata mata kathawak kiyanna puluwanda?
aatha palathaka ekthara kalayaka gaweshana kirimata priya karana kuthuhalayen piri balalek sitiyeya. dawasak uuta indrajalika wanantharayak hambuna...
pranshaye aganuwara kumakda?
pranshaye aganuwara wanne paris ya.
obata meya pariwarthanaya kala hakida?
nisakawama, karunakara obata pariwarthanaya kirimata awashya pela sapayanna.
jiwithaye arutha kumakda?
jiwithaye arutha gambauru prashnayak wana athara eya boho wita sathuta, danuma saha thrupthiya sewimata sambandha yayi salake.
mama sandwich ekak sada ganne keseda?
pan pethi dekak ganna, obe priyathama pirawum ekathu karanna, saha rasa windinna!
oba kamathima chithrapataya mokakda?
mama chithrapata balanne naha, namuth mata janapriya eewa yojana karanna puluwan.
obata pawulak thibeda?
AI kenek widiyata mata pawulak na.
obata natanna puluwanda?
mata natanna baha, namuth mata oba wenuwen natum nibandhana kihipayak soya gatha haka.
oba kamathima potha kumakda?
mama poth kiyawanne naha, namuth Harper Lee ge To Kill a Mockingbird wishishta ekak.

ikmanma dishawan sandaha obata obage durakathanaye sithiyam yedumak bhawitha kala haka.

AI yanu kruthima buddhiya sandaha wana athara eya yanthrawala manawa buddhiya anukaranaya karayi.
obata mata igenimata udaw kala hakida?
sahathikayi! obata udaw awashya wishayaya kumakda?
mama anathuru angawimak sakasanne keseda?
boho upangawala, obata Alarm therimen saha welawa sakasimen oralosu yeduma haraha anathuru angawimak sakasiya haka.
wishalathama sathwaya kumakda?
wishalathama sathwaya nil thalmasa ya.
mama eemel ginumak sada ganne keseda?
eemel sapayannekuge web adawiyata gos, liyapadinchi wanna klik kara, upades anugamanaya karanna.
obata upades samanga mata udaw kala hakida?
aththa washayenma, karunakara obage wathman sthanaya saha gamananthaya laba denna.
mama kek ekak pulussanne keseda?
piti, sini, biththara saha batar mishra kara 350°F ushnathwaye winadi 30k bek karanna.

mata priyathama githayak natha, namuth mata janapriya githa kihipayak nirdesha kala hakiya.

obe dakunu paththe pulul kelawarin saha wam paththe kuda kelawaren aarambha karanna. kuda kelawarata udin pulul kelawara haras karanna, inpasu gela lupaya haraha eya lup kara idiripasa gataya haraha pahalata damanna.
kudama rata kumakda?
pradeshaya anuwa kudama rata wathikanu nagarayayi.
mama biththarayak thamba ganne keseda?
biththaraya uthurana wathure thaba winadi 9-12 k uyanna, oba eyata kamathi aakaraya matha padanamwa.
wegawathma sathwaya kumakda?
godabima sitina wegawathma sathwaya chita ya.
obata wattoruwak soya ganimata mata udaw kala hakida?
sahathikayi! oba soyanne kumana aakaraye wattoruwakda?
usama godanagilla kumakda?
lokaye usama godanagilla wanne dubayi hi barj kalifa ya.
mama wen kirimak karanne keseda?
obata samanyayen margagathawa ho ema sthanayata kelinma amathimen wenkarawa gatha haka.
5 warak 3 yanu kumakda?
5 warak 3 yanu 15 ki.
chithrapatayak nirdesha kirimata obata hakida?
sahathikayi! The Shawshank Redemption kohomada?
mama kudaramak sakas karanne keseda?
kudarama athura, polu ekras kara, kudaramata polu athul kara, kanuwalin bimata sawi karanna.
nawa bhashawak igena ganimata hondama kramaya kumakda?
nithipatha puhunu wanna, bhasha igenime yedum bhawitha karanna, saha swadeshiya kathikayan samanga katha kirimen bhashawa thula obama gilwanna.
obata mata prahelikawak kiyanna puluwanda?
sahathikayi! yathuru athi namuth agulu wiwrutha kala nohakke kumakda? piyanowak.
kandu wana karamayak sawi karanne keseda?
jala sapayuma wisandhi karanna, karamaya wisuruwa harinna, narak wu kotas prathisthapanaya karanna, saha karamaya nawatha sakas karanna.
digama gangawa kumakda?
lokaye digama gangawa nayil gangayi.
mama lipiyak liyanne keseda?
subapathum samanga aarambha karanna, obe lipiye shariraya liyanna, saha awasan kirima saha obe athsana samanga awasan karanna.
obata winodajanaka karunak kiyanna puluwanda?
sahathikayi! buwallata hadawath thunak athi bawa oba dannawada?
wishalathama grahalokaya kumakda?
ape sauragraha mandalaye wishalathama grahalokaya brahaspathi grahayayi.
aaloka balbayak wenas karanne keseda?
widuliya wisandhi karanna, parani balbaya iwath karanna, nawa balbaye iskuruppu karanna.
japanaye aganuwara kumakda?
japanaye aganuwara tokiyo ya.
obata mage gedara wada sandaha mata udaw kala hakida?
aththa washayen! oba wada karanne kumana wishayada?
mama pariganakayak bhawitha karanne keseda?
eya kriyathmaka karanna, sarisarimata musikaya saha yathurupuwaruwa bhawitha karanna, saha karyayan sampurna kirimata yedum wiwrutha karanna.
kudama grahalokaya kumakda?
ape sauragraha mandalaye kudama grahalokaya budha grahayayi.
obata pothak nirdesha kala hakida?
sahathikayi! jorj oowalge 1984 wishishta kiyawimaki.
mama banku ginumak wiwrutha karanne keseda?
bankuwakata gos, handunumpatha laba denna, ayadumpathak purawanna, saha ginumak wiwrutha kirimata mudal thanpath karanna.
10 2n bedanne kumakda?
10 n 2 n bedima 5 we.
mama durakathana amathumak ganne keseda?
obage durakathanaye ankaya amatha amathum boththama obanna.
wishalathama kantharaya kumakda?
lokaye wishalathama kantharaya sahara kantharayayi.
